rows.label: qev092502_MSG0001
rows.name: The hell did you do, Lin?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0002
rows.name: I...I don't know! Just give me a second![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0003
rows.name: Ack![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0003_2
rows.name:
I had the amp-furnace
circuit in backwards![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0004
rows.name:
I am SO sorry. I can't believe I'd do
something that dumb in the final check...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0005
rows.name: Oh, you're back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0006
rows.name:
I take it you managed to
gather the materials?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0006_2
rows.name: As you can see...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0007
rows.name:
The test flight's gonna need to be
postponed. Maybe canceled entirely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0008
rows.name:
Sorry for the bad news
after all your hard work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0009
rows.name: No, wait![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0009_2
rows.name:
I'll handle the repairs and
resolve the final issues myself![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0010
rows.name: Commander, please.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0010_2
rows.name:
I need this to work. I
need to make it happen.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0011
rows.name:
It's the last homework
assignment I'll ever have.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0012
rows.name: Please, sir. Let me complete it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0013
rows.name:
Mmm... I understand where
you're coming from, Lin.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0014
rows.name:
But it's not my call. That last slip-up
has the Sakuraba guys spooked.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0015
rows.name:
The higher-ups aren't going to be happy
unless this thing can be mass-produced.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0016
rows.name: But all my work...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0018
rows.name:
The apple really doesn't
fall far from the tree.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0019
rows.name:
Don't worry about it, Vandham.
I'll convince my people.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0020
rows.name:
I may just be a humble engineer, but
I've given my life to Sakuraba.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0021
rows.name:
Let an old man cash in
some of his favors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0022
rows.name: Thank you, Isobe![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0023
rows.name:
Well that's one problem down. But
this death trap still needs a pilot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0024
rows.name:
After that little display before, I doubt
anyone'll be nuts enough to volunteer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0025
rows.name: You'd have to be reeeeal crazy...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev092502_SEL0011
rows.name: Volunteer to be the test pilot.

rows.label: qev092502_JNK0020
rows.name: Deflect

rows.label: qev092502_SEL0021
rows.name: Say that Doug is the logical choice.

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0026
rows.name:
Thank you so, so much! I swear
I'll make this thing work![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0027
rows.name:
True, Doug would probably
be willing to help, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0028
rows.name:
Honestly, after all we've been through
together, I'd really rather you do this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0029
rows.name:
Welp, you heard the girl. Can't back out
now that she put you on the spot, huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0030
rows.name:
Now that THAT'S settled, when can you
have this bucket of bolts fixed?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0031
rows.name: I'll have it ready by tomorrow.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0032
rows.name:
All right, you've got till
morning. Past that, and I'll
have to call it off for now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0033
rows.name:
The higher-ups'll want to take another
long look and decide if this is still
where they wanna spend their money.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0034
rows.name:
Understood. I won't let everyone's
hard work go to waste.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0035_m
rows.name:
And I won't let down my brave
test pilot either. I swear![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0035_f
rows.name:
And I won't let down my brave
test pilot either. I swear![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0036
rows.name: It's done. I did it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0037
rows.name:
I swear it's totally safe and
secure this time, Commander.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0038
rows.name:
We dreamed of a Doll that can fly through
the air, and now it's finally here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0039
rows.name:
Looks that way to me. And
trust me, I looked close.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0040
rows.name:
This thing should work.
...It better work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0041
rows.name: What do you say?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0041_2
rows.name:
Ready to put your life in
the hands of this thing?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev092502_SEL0031
rows.name: Give a thumbs-up.

rows.label: qev092502_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev092502_SEL0041
rows.name:
Say you're feeling pretty
sleepy right now.

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0042
rows.name:
Thaaat's the spirit! Should be
a helluva view from up there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0043
rows.name: ...Assuming you get up there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0044
rows.name:
It'll fly, jeez! Do you
trust me on this or not?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0045
rows.name: Oh, c'mon![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0046
rows.name:
You're gonna go on a perfect
test flight and show all these
nay-sayers what's up![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0047
rows.name:
Hey, nothing like blasting into
the sky to wake a body up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0048
rows.name:
I'll stick with coffee myself. Less
chance of Lin killing me and all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0049
rows.name: Don't count on that, buster![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0050
rows.name:
Now get up there, have a perfect
test flight, and show all these
nay-sayers what's up![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0051
rows.name:
All right, let's get this
party started. Fly her to the
specified point to start.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0052
rows.name:
It's a spot we haven't been
able to reach before now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0053
rows.name:
The perfect landing point
for our test flight![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0054
rows.name: I thought so.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0055
rows.name:
We'll be monitoring your
progress from here. Good luck.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0056
rows.name:
Oh, and whatever you do,
don't damage the Doll.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092502_MSG0057
rows.name:
I think what you meant to
say was "come home safe."[ST:wait ]
